description_long: This rifle features a long, matte black barrel with a prominent muzzle device at the tip, and an olive green receiver and stock. The stock is angular and includes a thumbhole grip, providing ergonomic support for the shooter. The rifle is equipped with a detachable box magazine located just in front of the trigger guard, and a rail system runs along the top of the receiver, though no sighting system is attached. The handguard and barrel are robust, suggesting a heavy or precision-oriented design, likely for long-range use. The overall construction appears to be primarily metal with some polymer components, giving it a modern tactical appearance. The color scheme is utilitarian, with olive green and black dominating the exterior.
description: A modern, olive green and black rifle with a long barrel, thumbhole stock, and detachable box magazine, designed for precision and tactical use.
description_view_0: The rifle is seen from the front, showing the circular muzzle device and the narrow profile of the barrel.
description_view_1: The left side view displays the full length of the rifle, highlighting the thumbhole stock, detachable box magazine, and the rail system on top.
description_view_2: The rear view shows the back of the stock and the alignment of the barrel, with minimal detail visible.
description_view_3: The right side view mirrors the left, showing the thumbhole stock, magazine, and the uninterrupted length of the barrel.
